title: Criminal Complaints: Stark Corporation Public Company Limited
text:
Stark Corporation Public Company Limited ("STARK"), a securities issuer, failed to prepare and submit (1) the audited financial statements for the year 2024 (2) the key financial ratio for the year 2024 (3) the financial highlight for the year 2024 (4) the financial covenants for the year 2024 and (5) the annual report for the year 2024 (Form 56-2) through the transmission system of the SEC Office within the period specified in the notification

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official.
name: Stark Corporation Public Company Limited
